backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the AyurGlow blog backend, defining BlogPost/Comment types and CRUD operations (create, update, delete, get, list published posts) plus comment management and blob storage mixin.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades OldBlogPost records (lacking imageSize) to NewBlogPost records by adding a null imageSize field, used during canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming high-confidence implementation of the image size selector feature across BlogPostDetailPage, CreateBlogPostPage, and EditBlogPostPage.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component/page's purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind layers and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including sidebar, chart, and UI element tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the AyurGlow Secrets React SPA, mounting the app at #root and loading the main.tsx module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, blog, admin CRUD, health/skin/hair subcategory pages, legal pages) wrapped in a QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/BlogSidebar.tsx: Sidebar component for blog pages displaying a remedy search bar with results overlay, popular posts list with thumbnails, and a category count breakdown.
frontend/src/components/CommentSection.t: Renders a comment form and list for a given blog post, using React Query hooks to fetch and submit comments with loading states.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedPost.tsx: Displays a single featured blog post as a full-width image card with overlaid title, excerpt, metadata, and a link to the post page.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site-wide footer with brand logo, quick links, category links, legal links, and social media icons.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps page content with the shared Navigation and Footer components in a full-height flex column layout.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with desktop links, a categories dropdown, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Displays a blog post summary card with thumbnail image, category badge, title, excerpt, and author/date/read-time metadata.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Controlled search input with a clear button and keyboard event handlers (Enter, Escape, ArrowDown) forwarded via ref.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Dropdown list of search results with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter, Escape) and click-to-navigate behavior.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on blog posts and comments, including fetching all/published posts, a single post, and mutations for create, update, delete, and comment actions.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemedySearch.ts: Hook that provides client-side search over a static list of Ayurvedic remedy pages, filtering by title, category, or keywords based on the current search query.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, defines CSS custom properties for a warm Ayurvedic color palette in light and dark modes, and establishes base typography styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page component displaying AyurGlow Secrets' mission, philosophy, and offerings using a hero section and styled content cards.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPostsPage.tsx: Admin page for managing blog posts, displaying a list of all posts with options to create, edit, and delete them, including a confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPage.tsx: Public blog listing page that fetches and displays published posts in a grid layout alongside a sidebar, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPostDetailPage.ts: Detail page for a single blog post, found by slug from published posts, rendering content with images, metadata, and a comment section.
frontend/src/pages/CreateBlogPostPage.ts: Admin form page for creating a new blog post, supporting rich-text editing via ReactQuill, image uploads with size options, and publish/draft toggling.
frontend/src/pages/EditBlogPostPage.tsx: Admin form page for editing an existing blog post, pre-populating fields from fetched post data and supporting image replacement and size configuration.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/DandruffSca: A page displaying four natural/Ayurvedic remedies for dandruff and scalp care, each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency. Includes a hero section and links back to the Hair Care page.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/GreyHairSol: A page presenting four Ayurvedic remedies to prevent and reverse premature greying, including curry leaf oil, amla-henna pack, black tea rinse, and bhringraj-brahmi oil, with full ingredient and application details.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairFallTre: A page listing four natural hair fall treatments (onion juice, fenugreek mask, amla-shikakai pack, curry leaves oil) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairGrowthP: A page showcasing four Ayurvedic hair growth remedies including castor-coconut oil blend, aloe-bhringraj mask, egg-yogurt protein treatment, and hibiscus-curry leaves pack, each with detailed instructions.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/OilsMasksPa: A page featuring five Ayurvedic hair oil and mask treatments (hot oil blend, brahmi-amla oil, banana-avocado mask, hibiscus-fenugreek mask, neem-tulsi scalp oil) with full preparation and application details.
frontend/src/pages/HairCarePage.tsx: Static category landing page for Hair Care, displaying a hero section and a grid of subcategory cards linking to specific hair care topics.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diabe: Displays a static page of four Ayurvedic remedies (Fenugreek Seed Water, Bitter Gourd Juice, Cinnamon-Honey Tonic, Garlic-Lemon) for managing diabetes and blood pressure, each with ingredients, steps, benefits, and frequency.
A styled alternative diabetes and BP support page using Card components and a back-navigation link, presenting four similar Ayurvedic remedies with a prominent medical disclaimer alert.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diges: Renders a styled digestion and gut health remedy page with four Ayurvedic remedies (Triphala, Ginger-Lemon Tonic, Ajwain Water, Buttermilk with Cumin), each displayed in a Card with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage.

A simpler digestion remedies page listing four Ayurvedic treatments (Triphala, Ginger-Lemon Tonic, CCF Tea, Ajwain Water) with icons, ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a minimal card layout.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Immun: Displays a page of four Ayurvedic immunity-boosting remedies (e.g., Turmeric Milk, Amla Juice) with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage, styled with a green hero section and card layout.

Displays four Ayurvedic immunity-boosting remedies (Turmeric Golden Milk, Tulsi-Ginger Tea, Chyawanprash Tonic, Amla-Honey Shot) with icons, ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a card-based layout.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Stres: Renders a stress relief and sleep page with four Ayurvedic remedies (e.g., Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Chamomile-Lavender Blend) showing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a simple card grid.

A styled alternative stress and sleep solutions page featuring the same four remedies as StressSleepPage but with a purple-themed hero section, back-navigation link, and Card-based layout consistent with other remedy pages.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Weigh: Displays four Ayurvedic weight management remedies (e.g., Lemon-Honey Water, Ginger-Green Tea) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a minimal card layout.
frontend/src/pages/HealthRemediesPage.ts: Displays the Health Remedies landing page with a hero section and a grid of five Ayurvedic subcategory cards (immunity, digestion, weight management, diabetes/BP, stress/sleep) that link to their respective routes.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the AyurGlow Secrets home page with a hero banner, a 'What We Offer' feature grid, and sections for featured and recent blog posts fetched via the useGetPublishedPosts hook.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Static Privacy Policy page presenting sections on data collection, usage, and user rights in styled cards, with a back-to-home link and a dynamically generated last-updated date.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcnePimples: Presents four natural acne and pimple remedies (e.g., Neem-Turmeric Face Pack, Tea Tree Oil Spot Treatment) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency, using a blue-themed hero section and card layout.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcneTreatme: Displays a page of four Ayurvedic acne treatment remedies (e.g., Neem-Turmeric Paste, Tea Tree-Aloe Spot Treatment), each showing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AntiAgingPa: Renders a page of four natural anti-aging remedies (e.g., Almond-Saffron Youth Serum, Avocado-Honey Mask), each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/DIYFacePack: Presents five DIY face pack recipes categorized by skin type (e.g., Multani Mitti for oily skin, Oatmeal-Honey for sensitive skin), with ingredients, steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/NaturalGlow: Shows four Ayurvedic natural glow remedies (e.g., Turmeric-Yogurt Mask, Saffron-Milk Treatment), each listing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and recommended frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/Pigmentatio: Displays a page for treating pigmentation and dark spots with four natural remedies (e.g., Lemon-Honey Mask, Potato-Cucumber Juice), including a hero section, ingredients, steps, benefits, and frequency.

React page displaying four natural Ayurvedic remedies for skin pigmentation reduction, each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency. Includes a sun protection warning banner.
frontend/src/pages/SkinCarePage.tsx: Displays the Skin Care landing page with a hero section and a grid of five Ayurvedic skin-care subcategory cards (natural glow, acne, pigmentation, anti-aging, DIY face packs) that link to their respective routes.
frontend/src/pages/TermsOfServicePage.ts: Static Terms of Service page with a medical disclaimer alert and multiple policy sections (agreement, website use, etc.) rendered in styled cards, including a dynamically generated last-updated date.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the AyurGlow Secrets frontend, defining custom colors (earth/sage/forest greens, gold, ocean blue, etc.), typography, spacing, shadows, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for AyurGlow Secrets blog, recording existing features (image size selector in blog post forms) and pending feature requests (backend data model extension for image size persistence).
